zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas De Hastings於大約1225年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Thomas de Hastings27歲，母親Amicia De Warwickshire26歲。他於大約1242年與Emmeline de Héron在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1245年住在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾費隆格利。他去世於1286年5月19日享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas De Hastings于大约1225年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Thomas de Hastings27岁，母亲Amicia De Warwickshire26岁。他于大约1242年与Emmeline de Héron在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1245年住在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾費隆格利。他去世于1286年5月19日享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas De Hastings was born about 1225, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Hastings, was 27 and his mother, Amicia De Warwickshire, was 26. He married Emmeline de Héron about 1242, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom in 1245. He died on 19 May 1286, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas De Hastings est né environ 1225, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Hastings, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Amicia De Warwickshire, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Emmeline de Héron environ 1242, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1245. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1286, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Hastingsが約1225年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Hastingsは27歳，母Amicia De Warwickshireは26歳であった。約1242年にイギリスイギリスでEmmeline de Héronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1245年にはイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーに住んでいた。彼は1286年5月19日に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Hastings(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Hastings(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicia De Warwickshire(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Emmeline de Héron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1245년도에 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 피론글리에서 살았다. 그는 1286년 5월 19일 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas De Hastings родился около 1225 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Hastings было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicia De Warwickshire, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Emmeline de Héron около 1242 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1245 году. Он умер 19 мая 1286 г. в возрасте 62 лет.
